blog_title: Koh Samui Amazing Attractions Not to Miss
seo_title: Koh Samui Amazing Attractions Not to Miss
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Mon Jun 23 2025

Koh Samui is a tropical paradise located in the Gulf of Thailand. Known for its stunning beaches, vibrant nightlife, and lush landscapes, this is an exotic getaway for travelers from Kolkata. You can find an array of exciting attractions that make it a perfect holiday destination. Are you considering a package tour from Kolkata?

Here are some amazing attractions in Koh Samui that you absolutely cannot miss.

Chaweng Beach

Whether you want to relax during the day or enjoy the nightlife, Chaweng Beach has something for everyone. The most popular and vibrant beach on Koh Samui, it is a must-visit for any traveler. Stretching over 7 kilometers, this stunning beach boasts powdery white sand and crystal-clear waters. It is perfect for sunbathing, swimming, and water sports.

Along the beachfront, you will find an array of cafes, restaurants, and bars, offering delicious local and international cuisine. As the sun sets, Chaweng transforms into a lively party hub. Its beach clubs host lovely music and dance events.

Big Buddha

Standing at an impressive 12 meters tall, this magnificent golden statue is perched on a small island -connected to Koh Samui by a causeway. The temple complex and its surrounding area make it an ideal spot for reflection and appreciation of Thai culture. Climb the steps leading to the statue to enjoy a breathtaking panoramic view of the island.

Ang Thong National Marine Park


This stunning archipelago, consisting of42 islands, is known for its dramatic limestone mountains, pristine beaches, and vibrant marine life. Explore the park through kayaking, snorkeling, and hiking. The viewpoint atKoh Wua Talap is one of the highlights. A short trek rewards you with breathtaking views of emerald lagoons and surrounding islands. Experience thebeauty of the coastal landscapes of Thailand.

Na Muang Waterfalls

Koh Samui also boasts of beautiful waterfalls,perfect for a refreshing dip.Na Muang Waterfalls,located in the island’s interior, consists of two stunning cascades. The first waterfall is easily accessible, while the second requires a short trek through the jungle. The natural pools formed at the base of the waterfalls provide a perfect spot for swimming and relaxing amidst nature.

Fisherman’s Village in Bophut

Come to thisquaint area for traditional wooden houses, boutique shops, and a variety of dining options that line the beach. On Fridays, the village hosts a lively night market, where visitors can sample delicious street food, shop for handicrafts, and enjoy live music. The laid-back atmosphere, combined with beautiful sunset views over the water, makes Fisherman’s Village a perfect spot for a romantic evening or a leisurely stroll.

FAQ

Is Koh Samui Cheaper than Phuket?

The food and accommodation rates are slightly higher in Koh Samui, but your choices and options that you go for can determine the expenses.

How Much Does It Cost To Holiday in Koh Samui?

It can depend on your duration of holiday, accommodation, meals and other options that you choose, and a few other factors. A good travel operator can help ensure an affordable trip for you.
